case_title: MARDY S IRELAND VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA,INC. A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF IRELAND, MARDY S (MERLE) AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA,INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IRELAND, MARDY S (MERLE) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA,INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $5,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.89 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,455.89, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

NOTICE OF THIRD PARTY ACTION ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT TO LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA. FILED BY PLAINTIFF IRELAND, MARDY S (MERLE) AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA,INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF IRELAND, MARDY S (MERLE)
